acquisition method: The mass spectrometer was operated in a data-dependent mode using CID fragmentation
alkylation reagent: alkylated using 30 mM acrylamide for 30 minutes
alkylation concentration: alkylated using 30 mM acrylamide for 30 minutes
cleavage agent: with 500ng of mass spectrometry grade trypsin/LysC mix
fragmentation method: using CID fragmentation for MS/MS spectra generation
instrument: using an Orbitrap Eclipse Tribrid mass spectrometer
